about.title: About
about.description: Freelance developer focused on secure, production-ready web systems and practical tooling.
about.body1: I am a freelance developer building secure and maintainable applications, with a strong focus on backend engineering, API design, and production reliability.
about.body2: This stack evolves over time as I explore new solutions and adapt to changing needs. I stay curious and continuously test new technologies to improve my projects.

notes.flyway: Versioned SQL migrations in delivery pipelines.
notes.nuxt: Full-stack Vue framework for SSR, SSG, and content sites.
notes.nuxtUi: Composable UI primitives aligned with Nuxt workflows.
notes.tailwind: Utility-first styling for fast and consistent interfaces.
notes.shadcn: Reusable component patterns and design conventions.
notes.intellij: Main IDE for Java and backend work.
notes.vscode: Lightweight editor for web and infra tasks.
notes.github: Code hosting, review, and delivery workflows.
notes.jsonCrack: Visualize JSON and complex object structures.
